headline: The French people's vote is still up for grabs
description: The clear and decisive municipal election results in most cities show that the 2027 presidential election is far from a foregone conclusion. While distrust and the democratic malaise are very real, voters are not indifferent to the growth of the radical left and the far right's possible rise to power.

headline: EU and Australia strike free trade deal after years of talks

Marine Le Pen voices support for her 'friend' Viktor Orban
description: The nationalist prime minister is taking advantage of opportunities to rally his foreign supporters, particularly Europeans, in Budapest ahead of the April 12 legislative elections, which could prove difficult for him.

headline: Mette Frederiksen heads into Danish elections as a global figure, but a divisive one domestically
description: The leader of the Social Democrats, in power since 2019, seeks reelection on Tuesday. While her support for Ukraine and her firm stance against Donald Trump regarding Greenland have earned her recognition on the European stage, her party has been struggling in the polls.

headline: French municipal elections: Full results in every city, town and village
description: French voters elected more than 34,000 mayors on March 15 and 22. Use our search engine to find the winner in any municipality.

headline: Paris municipal elections: Emmanuel Grégoire and the united left achieve a resounding victory
description: Despite a united front from the entire right-wing and centrist parties – as well as competition on the left with La France Insoumise candidate Sophia Chikirou remaining in the race – the Socialist candidate delivered the united left its most impressive victory in Paris since 2001.
byline: Hélène Bekmezian,  Léo Lagniez and  Raphaëlle Bacqué

headline: Charif Majdalani: Lebanon is 'truly being dragged against its will into new calamities'

headline: France's aircraft carrier located in real time by Le Monde through Strava data
description: As the Charles de Gaulle and its strike group approach the Middle East, Le Monde identified a French sailor using the Strava fitness application in the Mediterranean Sea. This security flaw remains unaddressed despite our previous revelations.
